taskDescription: Complete the crossword — Deep Structures in the Neck

words.clue: Gland enclosed by pretracheal fascia that moves on swallowing
Sheath containing common carotid artery, IJV, and vagus nerve
Nerve at risk during thyroid surgery running in the tracheo-oesophageal groove
Syndrome with ptosis miosis and anhidrosis from sympathetic chain damage
Extra rib at C7 causing thoracic outlet syndrome
Fascia layer that forms the roof of the posterior triangle
Dangerous space through which neck infections descend to mediastinum
Vein visible on the surface of the neck draining into subclavian vein
